### Procedure 

For all attack flow actions a Procedure object is generated like so;

```json
{
    "type": "procedure",
    "spec_version": "2.1",
    "id": "procedure--<GENERATED BY STIX2 LIBRARY>",
    "created_by_ref": "identity--<DEFAULT OR CUSTOM IDENTITY OBJECT ID>",
    "created": "<REPORT CREATED PROPERTY VALUE>",
    "modified": "<REPORT MODIFIED PROPERTY VALUE>",
    "name": "<ATTACK FLOW EXTRACTION>",
    "description": "<ATTACK FLOW EXTRACTION>",
    "objective": "<ATTACK FLOW EXTRACTION>",
    "context": "<ATTACK FLOW EXTRACTION>",
    "variants": ["<ATTACK FLOW EXTRACTION>"],
    "object_marking_refs": [
        "marking-definition--<TLP LEVEL SET>",
        "marking-definition--f92e15d9-6afc-5ae2-bb3e-85a1fd83a3b5"
    ],
    "external_references": [
        {
            "source_name": "txt2stix_report_id",
            "external_id": "<UUID OF REPORT OBJECT>"
        },
        {
            "source_name": "mitre-attack",
            "external_id": "<TECHNIQUE ID FROM ATTACK FLOW>"
        }
    ],
    "extensions": {
        "extension-definition--3dc9c77a-9790-5cd0-94d5-2337871b886b": {
            "extension_type": "new-sdo"
        }
    }
}
```

UUIDv5 is generated using namespace `f92e15d9-6afc-5ae2-bb3e-85a1fd83a3b5` and `txt2stix+<report_id>+<name>`

Each procedure is linked to the 

* attack-action (attack flow)
* attack-pattern (att&CK)

Using an SRO:

```json
{
    "type": "relationship",
    "spec_version": "2.1",
    "id": "relationship--<GENERATED BY STIX2 LIBRARY>",
    "created_by_ref": "identity--<DEFAULT/CUSTOM IDENTITY ID>",
    "created": "<REPORT CREATED DATE>",
    "modified": "<REPORT CREATED DATE>",
    "relationship_type": "related-to",
    "source_ref": "procedure--<ID>",
    "target_ref": "<ATT&CK / ATTACK FLOW OBJECT>",
    "description": "<PROCEDURE NAME> is related to <ATT&CK / ATTACK FLOW OBJECT NAME>",
    "object_marking_refs": [
        "marking-definition--<TLP LEVEL SET>"
        "marking-definition--f92e15d9-6afc-5ae2-bb3e-85a1fd83a3b5"
    ],
    "external_references": [
        {
            "source_name": "txt2stix_report_id",
            "external_id": "<UUID OF REPORT OBJECT>"
        },
        {
            "source_name": "mitre-attack",
            "external_id": "<TECHNIQUE ID FROM ATTACK FLOW>"
        }
    ]
}
```
